title: hyoseris scabra
intro: Hyoseris scabra, also known as rough ball-head or rough rosy ball-head, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hyoseris scabra include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Hyoseris scabra is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used in ointments and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
